_doc: Patch 6 crossover task set (OFF-DOGFOOD). buried = code-intent queries whose domain words match the PROSE docs but NOT the implementation symbol name, so docs bury the code; the reranker (Patch 4 prose-demote) should HELP. control = an entrypoint query (the wrapper IS the answer) and a doc-intent query (the doc IS the answer) — the reranker must NOT regress either. Schema: {buried:[{q,files,symbols}], control:[...]}.

buried.q: where is the billing amount computed in the service
how does the overdue late fee get computed

control.q: cli command to start the billing server
